import React from "react"; import profileImage from "../assets/profile.jpeg"; const LightningIcon = () => ( ); function Home() { return (

Welcome

Hi, I'm Kushal.

⚡ Electrical engineering | 🔧 Hands-on learner

I'm an Electrical Engineering student who likes building useful things and learning how they work. I enjoy simple, practical ideas that solve real problems. I also like working with others, learning new tools, and improving a project step by step until it feels right.

⚡ Electrical Engineering 🔧 Hands-on Projects 🤝 Team Friendly

Kushal

Electrical Engineering

); } export default Home;
